channel.title: models-watch
channel.description: Model change notifications for opencode-go and free OpenCode Zen models

item.title: Models: 6 changed
item.description: Changed: opencode-go/minimax-m2.5 - "MiniMax M2.5" → "MiniMax-M2.5" opencode-go/minimax-m2.7 - "MiniMax M2.7" → "MiniMax-M2.7" opencode-go/minimax-m3 - "MiniMax M3 (3x usage)" → "MiniMax-M3 (3x usage)" opencode/minimax-m2.1-free - "MiniMax M2.1 Free" → "MiniMax-M2.1 Free" opencode/minimax-m2.5-free - "MiniMax M2.5 Free" → "MiniMax-M2.5 Free" opencode/minimax-m3-free - "MiniMax M3 Free" → "MiniMax-M3 Free"

item.title: Models: 29 added
item.description: Added: opencode-go/deepseek-v4-flash opencode-go/deepseek-v4-pro opencode-go/glm-5 opencode-go/glm-5.1 opencode-go/kimi-k2.5 opencode-go/kimi-k2.6 opencode-go/mimo-v2-omni opencode-go/mimo-v2-pro opencode-go/mimo-v2.5 opencode-go/mimo-v2.5-pro opencode-go/minimax-m2.5 opencode-go/minimax-m2.7 opencode-go/qwen3.5-plus opencode-go/qwen3.6-plus opencode/big-pickle opencode/glm-4.7-free opencode/glm-5-free opencode/grok-code opencode/hy3-preview-free opencode/kimi-k2.5-free opencode/ling-2.6-flash-free opencode/mimo-v2-flash-free opencode/mimo-v2-omni-free opencode/mimo-v2-pro-free opencode/minimax-m2.1-free opencode/minimax-m2.5-free opencode/nemotron-3-super-free opencode/qwen3.6-plus-free opencode/trinity-large-preview-free
